hudPermissionStates.command: manual Windows HUD desktop/tool placement check
hudPermissionStates.notes: Windows does not require macOS Accessibility or Screen Recording gates.

hudPermissionStates.command: manual macOS Accessibility and Screen Recording granted/denied check
hudPermissionStates.notes: Must verify HUD behavior with permissions both granted and denied.

hostSmoke.command: npm run smoke:browser-hosts -- --require --test-options-health with Chrome for Testing PATH
hostSmoke.notes: Chrome for Testing 149.0.7827.22 and Edge 148.0.3967.83 host smoke passed with temporary profiles; extension id ndknfhgaojabhngfhalaapmgchajelck loaded in both hosts; Options /health also checked.

manualLoad.command: Chrome for Testing and Edge load adapters/browser-extension unpacked
manualLoad.notes: Chrome for Testing version 149.0.7827.22 and Edge version 148.0.3967.83 loaded the unpacked adapter from adapters/browser-extension; extension id ndknfhgaojabhngfhalaapmgchajelck was enabled in both hosts.

manualConnection.command: Browser extension Options /health connection test via real Chrome for Testing and Edge hosts
manualConnection.notes: Local token source was userData api-token.txt without pasting the token into notes; /health returned HTTP 200 in Chrome for Testing and Edge Options pages; both reported Connected: 6 providers, 2 need attention.

hostSmoke.notes: Validation machine host smoke passed: VS Code 1.121.0 and Cursor 3.5.33 installed the VSIX and listed who-eats-token.who-eats-token-vscode-adapter.

manualLoad.command: Install VSIX in VS Code and Cursor
manualLoad.notes: VS Code version 1.121.0 and Cursor version 3.5.33 installed release/adapters/who-eats-token-vscode-adapter-0.1.0.vsix; adapter id who-eats-token.who-eats-token-vscode-adapter was listed as loaded in both hosts.

manualConnection.command: VS Code/Cursor status bar /health, refresh, and copy snapshot checks
manualConnection.notes: Must verify the status bar and commands inside each host.

windowsAuthenticode.notes: Requires Windows code-signing certificate and password in release environment.

macosNotarization.notes: Requires Developer ID signing and Apple notarization credentials.

dependencyAudit.notes: 2026-05-25 Windows source-beta audit completed with zero high-severity vulnerabilities.
